tasks.label: Run Web Game Dev Server + Chrome
Run Shogi Online (Room + Dev)
args:
$nodeDir='${workspaceFolder}\.tools
ode-v24.18.0-win-x64'; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-Command',"$env:Path='${workspaceFolder}\.tools
ode-v24.18.0-win-x64;' + $env:Path; & '${workspaceFolder}\.tools
ode-v24.18.0-win-x64
pm.cmd' run room"; Start-Process chrome 'http://localhost:5173/'; $env:Path="$nodeDir;$env:Path"; & '${workspaceFolder}\.tools
ode-v24.18.0-win-x64
pm.cmd' run dev
